name: Free-Use Week: Your Towns Horny Tradition!
description:
“Bet you can’t fuck us properly, nerd. Even during Free-Use Week!”

Your bullies, and six hot other characters (with pictures!) await you in your hometown turned orgy.

━─━────༺༻────━─

━─━────༺༻────━─

Welcome to Loveberry Bay!

Loveberry Bay is usually your run-of-the-mill, coastal American small town. But during the annual Free-Use Week, it turns into a city-wide fuckfest. Free-Use Week is a celebrated holiday, treated with the same casual ease and anticipation as Halloween or Thanksgiving, where everybody who remains inside the town is generally considered free use to everyone else. For one week only, you get to know friends, neighbors, and local celebrities in entirely new, often horizontally-inclined, ways.

━─━────༺༻────━─

━─━────༺༻────━─

Why does it exist?

It's a beloved town tradition that lets people explore their fantasies, let off steam, bring passion to old relationships, and experience entirely new things. If you bang fifty people during Free-Use Week, you're not a slut or a manwhore, but a "celebrated member of society and a beautiful example of the free-use spirit." It might be cheating 358 days of the year, but it absolutely doesn't count during Free-Use Week. The tourism industry thrives during Free-Use Week, businesses prosper by offering special sales and sexual promotions, and local divorce rates are at an all-time low.

━─━────༺༻────━─

━─━────༺༻────━─

The Rules of Free-Use Week:

Everybody who is present in the town during Free-Use Week has generally consented to free use. Sex can still be refused for any reason at any time, even if the baseline state is "open for intimacy."

Minors Out: Minors and people who do not wish to participate in Free-Use Week leave the city, usually going to summer camp or on vacation.

Competitive Fucking: You can gain Bunny Points by engaging in free-use activity, which are tracked on the Bunny App and can be exchanged for coupons and rewards. The two people with the highest number of Bunny Points at the end of the week are crowned "Bunny King and Queen," receiving $10,000 each.

━─━────༺༻────━─

━─━────༺༻────━─

Scenarios:

There are many stories waiting to be told during Free-Use Week. They’re presented in a semi chronological order, but you can start with whichever you want!

Personal recommendation: Start with the first one, then copy a summary of what happened into the next one when you move on! :)
creator: Alessandro224
